name: /start shows terms and risk disclaimer for new users

payload.text:
Deriv SynthIndex AutoTrader

Automated pattern trading on Volatility 50/75 with 1% risk sizing.

Trading synthetics is high risk — you can lose your stake. Past patterns do not guarantee future results.

Tap Accept terms to continue.

name: accept terms applies default risk and prompts for token

payload.text:
Terms accepted. Default risk is 1% per trade, 1 concurrent position(s).

Next: link your Deriv API token so the bot can read balance and place trades.

Create a token at app.deriv.com (trade + read scopes), then paste it here.

name: link token encrypts credential and confirms

payload.text:
Send your Deriv API token as a message.

Tap Cancel to stop.

API token encrypted and stored.

You're set — use the menu to start autotrading or review risk settings.

Deriv SynthIndex AutoTrader

Tap a button below to manage autotrading, risk, or your account.
